text: We definitively establish that the CO stretching response to metal coordination is exclusively the consequence of π polarization, which is quantitatively associated with the extent of π back-donation and accompanied by an elongation of the CO bond and decrease in frequency.
explanation: The sentence is densely technical with precise terminology (π back-donation, CO stretching) typical of expert writing; it's plausible as human-authored material, though modern AI can also generate similarly structured content.
